{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = World Spirit of Murrok
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[World Spirit of Murrok]] respects independence and looks down on those who cannot solve their own problems.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[World Spirit of Murrok]] is the [[World Spirit]] of a [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
